---
title: "Week 4 — Hands-on bioinformatics II & capstone"
subtitle: "Literature, protocols, and an end-to-end research micro-project"
---

## Topics

- AI-assisted literature review, with verification.
- AI as a sparring partner for protocol design.
- Putting it all together: a micro-project from question to writeup.

## Before class

Read:

- [Literature review](../bioinformatics/literature-review.qmd)
- [Protocol design](../bioinformatics/protocol-design.qmd)

## In class

- Demo: triaging a new subfield with a grounded search tool, verifying citations.
- Demo: iterating on a protocol with an AI sparring partner.
- Capstone brainstorming and peer feedback.

## After class

- **Capstone** *(30% of grade)*: an end-to-end research micro-project. Pick a small, tractable question in your field. Produce:
  - A short literature brief (≤ 5 verified citations).
  - A one-page proposed analysis or protocol.
  - A reflection (≤ 500 words) mapping your process onto the 4 D's.
  - A full disclosure statement.

## Wrap-up

- What worked, what didn't.
- Commitments: what will you keep doing after the course?

## Supplementary

*TODO.*
